subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are Thy believing servants and maidservants who have hearkened unto the call and responded to the summons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عبادک الموقنون و امائک الموقنات قد سمعوا الندآء و اجبن الدعاء
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
